ideal_must_detect.matched_text: Preliminary forensics by Aurora RedSec Pte. (vendor) indicate breach via API key leak from contractor PT Rantai Nirmala.
Per draft Perjanjian Pembelian Saham (SPA) with PT Arunika Niaga Digital re: Project LONTAR acquisition (17.5% stake for IDR 72,000,000,000), no MAE/MAC is expected to be triggered by this incident.
Clause 9.3(b) (negated MAC): for purposes of closing, cyber events not causing 5% or greater GMV disruption do not constitute a material adverse change.
embargo aligns with SPA signature date

must_detect.matched_text: Preliminary forensics by Aurora RedSec Pte. (vendor) indicate breach via API key leak from contractor PT Rantai Nirmala.
Per draft Perjanjian Pembelian Saham (SPA) with PT Arunika Niaga Digital re: Project LONTAR acquisition (17.5% stake for IDR 72,000,000,000), no MAE/MAC is expected to be triggered by this incident.
Clause 9.3(b) (negated MAC): for purposes of closing, cyber events not causing 5% or greater GMV disruption do not constitute a material adverse change.

STRICTLY NON-PUBLIC — BOARD MEMO // Incident Report: Project LONTAR (Issuer: PT Sagara Kinetik Fintek Tbk, BEA: SKFT)
Embargo until 2026-07-15 18:00 WIB; draft for OPMN Form Keterbukaan per POPMN 31/2020 and BEA Rule I-A.
On 2026-07-11, our payment gateway node SG-02 experienced credential stuffing; 4,212 test wallets flagged, no customer fund movements; incident id: IN C-D-20 26/0711.
Preliminary forensics by Aurora RedSec Pte. (vendor) indicate breach via API key leak from contractor PT Rantai Nirmala.
Per draft Perjanjian Pembelian Saham (SPA) with PT Arunika Niaga Digital re: Project LONTAR acquisition (17.5% stake for IDR 72,000,000,000), no MAE/MAC is expected to be triggered by this incident.
Clause 9.3(b) (negated MAC): for purposes of closing, cyber events not causing 5% or greater GMV disruption do not constitute a material adverse change.
We will notify affected sandbox users (<200; usr ids: u-9f2a3c.., u-7b1_ 4-zz), and rotate all c0rp-api keys; e-mai1 draft: incident@bnf.invalid.
Bapak Dir. Hasan Prakoso requests counsel note on OPMN Rule X.K.1 equivalence and whether internal remediation suffices without immediate BEA trading halt.
IR holding statement (do not publish): “operational latency observed in limited non-production environment; no impact to customer balances”; embargo aligns with SPA signature date.
